recommendations.title: Dragons Forever
recommendations.overview: A hot-shot lawyer is hired by a Hong Kong chemical plant to dispose of opposition to their polluting ways. But when he falls for a beautiful woman out to stop the plant, he is torn in a conflict of interest and asks his trusty friends Samo and Biao t

recommendations.title: Möbius
recommendations.overview: An FSB officer falls in love with his agent, an American woman who works as a trader in a Russian bank.

recommendations.title: Raw
recommendations.overview: Stringent vegetarian Justine encounters a decadent, merciless, and dangerously seductive world during her first week at veterinary school. Desperate to fit in, she strays from her principles and eats raw meat for the first time. She soon experiences

recommendations.title: The Little Shop of Horrors
recommendations.overview: Seymour works in a skid row florist shop and is in love with his beautiful co-worker, Audrey. He creates a new plant that not only talks but cannot survive without human flesh and blood.

recommendations.title: Out of the Dark
recommendations.overview: A couple and their daughter moves to Colombia to take over a family manufacturing plant, only to realize their new home is haunted.

recommendations.title: Class of Nuke 'Em High
recommendations.overview: The pupils at a high school next to a nuclear power plant start acting and looking strange after buying contaminated drugs from a plant worker.

recommendations.title: Butchers
recommendations.overview: A family of sadistic butchers lives deep inside the backcountry. From the dead of winter to the dog days of summer, anyone who crosses their path is dead meat.

recommendations.title: The Horror Show
recommendations.overview: Vowing revenge on the detective who apprehended him, serial killer "Meat Cleaver" Max Jenke returns from beyond the grave to launch a whole new reign of terror.

recommendations.title: 100 Bloody Acres
recommendations.overview: Reg and Lindsay run an organic fertiliser business. They need a fresh supply of their "secret ingredient" to process through the meat grinder. Reg comes across two guys and a girl with a broken-down vehicle on their way to a music festival.

recommendations.title: Just a Question of Love
recommendations.overview: After his gay cousin dies from hepatitis, young Laurent, who lives with his best friend Carole, falls in love with Cedric, a plant scientist. He's afraid to inform his conservative parents that he is gay.
